heading: Definitions
label: 410iiii Definitions
notes: Amendments2022—, substituted “In this subchapter:” for “As used in this subchapter—” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 117–123, § 3(b)(1)Par. (1). , added par. (1). Former par. (1) redesignated (3).Pub. L. 117–123, § 3(b)(5)–(4), inserted heading, substituted “The term” for “the term”, and subsequently redesignated par. (1) as (3).Pub. L. 117–123, § 3(b)(2)Par. Short Title of 2022 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–123, § 1136 Stat. 1196May 12, 2022“This Act [enacting , amending this section and sections 410iiii–1 to 410iiii–4 and 410iiii–6 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under this section] may be cited as the ‘Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park Expansion and Redesignation Act’.”section 410iiii–5 of this title

Redesignation of the Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park; References, (b), , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–123, § 2(a)136 Stat. 1196May 12, 2022“(a).—In GeneralThe Brown v. Board of Education National Historic Site established by () [] shall be known and designated as the ‘Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park’.section 103(a) of Public Law 102–525106 Stat. 343916 U.S.C. 410iiii–2(a)“(b).—ReferencesAny reference in any law, regulation, document, record, map, or other paper of the United States to the Brown v. Board of Education National Historic Site shall be considered to be a reference to the ‘Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park’.”

Purpose for Expansion of the Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park and Establishment of Affiliated Areas, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–123, § 3(a)136 Stat. 1196May 12, 2022“The purpose of this section [enacting and amending this section and sections 410iiii–1 to 410iiii–4 and 410iiii–6 of this title] is to honor the civil rights stories of struggle, perseverance, and activism in the pursuit of education equity.”section 410iiii–5 of this title

children.heading: Affiliated area
children.label: 1 Affiliated area
children.text: The term “affiliated area” means a site associated with a court case included in Brown v. Board of Education of Topeka described in paragraph (8), (9), or (10) of that is designated as an affiliated area of the National Park System by .section 410iiii–1(a) of this titlesection 410iiii–5(a) of this title

children.heading: Historical park
children.label: 2 Historical park
children.text: The term “historical park” means the Brown v. Board of Education National Historical Park as established in .section 410iiii–2 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
